query:
SELECT u.open_id, u.name, u.email, u.login_method, dp.driver_code, dp.name as profile_name
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN driver_profiles dp ON dp.owner_id = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'demo@autohaul.com' OR u.open_id LIKE 'demo-device:%' OR u.login_method = 'demo'
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
